paroles:
Avia any an-danitra, ry Jesoa Tompo
Mampianara anay ny lalana marina
Feno hafaliana ny fonay rehetra
Fiderana sy voninahitra ho Anao

[Fiv]
Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Amen
Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Amen

Andriamanitra lehibe
Midera Anao izahay
Feno voninahitra ny anaranao
Hallelujah ho Anao

[Fiv]
Lehibe, lehibe
Andriamanitra lehibe
Midera Anao izahay
Hallelujah
